name: Nishant Babasaheb Survase
summary: Final-year B.Tech Computer Science student and Salesforce Developer Intern skilled in Python, Apex, and AI tool integration. Proven experience in architecting CRM automation workflows, developing full-stack mobile applications, and deploying scalable data models to drive operational efficiency.
skills: Salesforce (Apex, SOQL, Flows, Agentforce, Salesforce Admin)

education.institution: JSPM's Rajarshi Shahu College of Engineering, Pune

experience.role: Salesforce Developer Intern - Jaguar Land Rover Project
bullets: Developed and customized Salesforce solutions using Apex, SOQL, and Flows to automate business processes and improve operational efficiency.
Architected CRM automation workflows and implemented automated test suites for Apex integrations, achieving required code coverage to ensure a stable and scalable trusted platform.
Developed and enhanced Flutter application features, improving user experience, application responsiveness, and overall performance.
Integrated APIs, resolved application issues, and collaborated with the development team to deliver stable and scalable mobile solutions.

projects.name: Railway Station Navigation System (Capstone Project)
bullets: Architected, designed, and implemented a highly scalable AR indoor navigation solution using Flutter, Unity, and A* routing to guide users across multi-point indoor paths with step-wise directions.
Implemented and optimized FastAPI APIs for route generation and navigation updates, reducing response latency and enabling near real-time user guidance.

projects.name: Customer Churn Prediction Platforms
bullets: Developed a machine learning-based customer churn prediction platform using Python, SQL, Pandas, and Scikit-Learn to analyze 7,000+ customer records and identify customers at risk of churn.

Performed data preprocessing and predictive modeling, utilizing dashboard visualizations to track key metrics and user data, driving operational excellence and generating actionable customer retention insights.

projects.name: Generative AI Job Application Assistant
bullets: Developed an AI-powered job application assistant using Google Gemini to analyze resumes, extract job requirements, perform candidate-job matching, and generate tailored resume content in structured JSON format.
Implemented automated cover letter generation, resume optimization, and NLP-based content enhancement to improve keyword relevance, skill alignment, and ATS compatibility for job applications.

leadership.title: Co-Organizer
bullets: Led teams to plan and execute TEDxJSPMRSCOE event, managing speakers and core operations.
Handled logistics, promotions, and audience engagement to deliver a polished TEDx experience.

leadership.title: Training and Placement Co-ordinator
bullets: Coordinated between students, faculty, and recruiters to support placement and training activities.
Assisted in organizing placement drives, pre-placement talks, and student training sessions.
